additionalFields.caption:
=🎬 *PREVIEW DE CAMPAÑA ({{ $("Parse manifest & copy").item.json.manifest.format === "video" ? "VIDEO" : "CARRUSEL" }}) - {{ $('Parse manifest & copy').item.json.copy.fecha }}*

*Tema:* {{ $('Parse manifest & copy').item.json.copy.tema_del_dia }} ({{ $('Parse manifest & copy').item.json.copy.materia_prioritaria }})

*Caption IG:*
```
{{ $('Parse manifest & copy').item.json.copy.caption_instagram }}
```

*CTA WhatsApp:* [Enlace wa.me]({{ $('Parse manifest & copy').item.json.copy.whatsapp_link }})

parameters.text:
=❌ *Campaña Rechazada*

La campaña del {{ $json.date }} ha sido marcada como 'review_failed' y no se publicará.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ $('Parse manifest & copy').item.json.manifest.format === 'video' ? { media_type: 'STORIES', video_url: 'https://centrodetutorias.com/content-generator/output/' + $('Parse manifest & copy').item.json.date + '/vertical_video.mp4?t=' + Date.now() } : { media_type: 'STORIES', image_url: 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/apolancog-dev/centrodetutorias/main/content-generator/output/' + $('Parse manifest & copy').item.json.date + '/vertical_1080x1920.png?t=' + Date.now() } }}

={{ { post_mode: 'DIRECT_POST', media_type: 'PHOTO', post_info: { title: 'Apoyo Académico - CEDETU', description: $('Parse manifest & copy').item.json.copy.texto_tiktok, privacy_level: 'SELF_ONLY', disable_comment: false, disable_duet: false, disable_stitch: false }, source_info: { source: 'PULL_FROM_URL', photo_cover_index: 0, photo_images: $json.photoImages } } }}

={{ { file_url: 'https://centrodetutorias.com/content-generator/output/' + $('Parse manifest & copy').item.json.date + '/vertical_video.mp4?t=' + Date.now(), description: $('Parse manifest & copy').item.json.copy.caption_facebook } }}

={{ { media_type: 'REELS', video_url: 'https://centrodetutorias.com/content-generator/output/' + $('Parse manifest & copy').item.json.date + '/vertical_video.mp4?t=' + Date.now(), caption: $('Parse manifest & copy').item.json.copy.caption_instagram, share_to_feed: true } }}

={{ { post_mode: 'DIRECT_POST', media_type: 'VIDEO', post_info: { title: 'Apoyo Académico - CEDETU', description: $('Parse manifest & copy').item.json.copy.texto_tiktok, privacy_level: 'SELF_ONLY', disable_comment: false, disable_duet: false, disable_stitch: false }, source_info: { source: 'PULL_FROM_URL', video_url: $json.videoUrl } } }}
